type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: NOx volumes have increased by greater than 10% due to a large increase in flared volume when comparing 2012 to 2013. Further, an update to engine specific emission factors caused emissions to increase when compared to 2012.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The decrease in both CO and Particulate Matter at this location is attributed to the large decrease in flared volume from 2011 to 2012. In 2012, approximately 96% less gas was flared when compared to 2011.
